feature.label: Eclipse Layout Kernel (Incubation) - Graphviz Library Support
feature.description: The Eclipse Layout Kernel provides automatic layout to diagram editors and viewers. This feature adds support for using the layout algorithms provided by the Graphviz library of algorithms. The library has to be installed separately. Download from: http://www.graphviz.org/
feature.copyright:
